sourceTitle: Guidelines for Students on the Use of Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI)
evidenceSnippetOriginal: The work that you submit for assessment must be YOUR OWN WORK. This means that the work must be original in the sense that it is your intellectual creation and its overall content is representative of your own expression of your own ideas, not a copy/version of other people's work or AI-generated material.

evidenceLocator: Academic Integrity section of GenAI student guidelines (as quoted in Library guide)
